title: GUI-Uniqueify
description: GUI-Uniqueify is a very small client-side mod which allow resource packs to make every GUI unique!
body:
**GUI-Uniqueify is a very small client-side mod which allow resource packs to make every GUI unique!**

### The UI's of the following objects can be uniqueified:
- Barrel
- Ender Chest
- Trapped Chest
- Shulker boxes (also based on color)
- Dropper
- Villagers (also based on profession and biome)

### Extra features:
- Change color of XP bar text
- Add a label overlay over your GUI texture for named containters

### Default textures:
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-uniqueify-default-textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-uniqueify-default-textures)
